content: Core table-stakes features for SME logistics/procurement MIS: real-time inventory tracking with current stock levels per product/SKU, purchase order lifecycle (create, submit, receive against PO), supplier profile management, stock-in/stock-out transactions with reasons logged, reorder threshold alerts when stock falls below minimum, role-based access restricting staff vs manager capabilities, and basic KPI dashboard showing stock health and PO status. These are the baseline features users expect from any logistics MIS replacing spreadsheets.
